perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a black apron and white top stands in a kitchen, gesturing towards an overlay clip of a Japanese TV show. (2) She holds up a clear plastic bag, initially misidentifying it, then laughs and corrects herself while a caption about 'daily stupidity' appears. (3) She demonstrates rubbing her hands vigorously with the plastic bag. (4) A split-screen visual comparison shows her hands appearing shiny/oily at the top and matte/clean at the bottom. (5) She extends her hand toward the lens, and another person's hand enters from off-camera to touch her palm.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, energetic female voice speaks Chinese over a bouncy, upbeat BGM. (2) Sound effects including a 'ding' and short cartoonish slide occur when text pops up. (3) The speaker laughs, and the BGM continues at a steady, playful tempo. (4) In the final segment, a brief male voice is heard off-camera responding to her request to touch her hand, followed by a playful musical flourish.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'What to do if hands are oily?', 'Let's test it out', 'Can plastic bags really remove oil?'. (2) Decorative Text: 'Daily stupidity achievement (1/1)', 'Experimenting... please wait', 'Wow, there is (an effect)', 'Sounds a bit "Mo Tang" (wrong/weird)'.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Failed take/Correction -> Demo -> Results -> Conclusion

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 male hand appearing at the end
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with dark hair tied back, wearing a white halter-neck top under a black apron.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern home kitchen with white cabinetry, a black oven/microwave, a stainless steel sink, and a silver refrigerator with magnets.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Error/Correction -> Demonstration -> Result -> Verification
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as an entertaining life-hack tutorial where the creator verifies a cleaning method seen on a Japanese TV show. By demonstrating how a plastic bag can remove oil from skin, the content aims to provide practical value through a humorous, relatable vlog format.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Self-deprecating humor captions, quick-cut editing style, interactive ending with off-camera crew.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video relies heavily on the 'Variety Show' editing style common in Asian social media, using large font overlays to highlight emotional beats and mistakes for comedic effect.
